Machine Learning Engineer — Acme AI Corp
Austin, TX · Hybrid · Full-time

About the Role
Acme AI Corp is looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to join our growing data science
team. You will design, build, and deploy ML models that power our core product. We love
the spring season here in Austin, but we especially love engineers who ship.

Required Skills & Qualifications
- 3+ years of professional experience in machine learning and software engineering
- Strong proficiency in Python for data analysis and model development
- Experience with SQL for querying and managing large datasets
- Hands-on experience with scikit-learn and PyTorch
- Familiarity with Docker for containerized model deployment
- Proficiency with Git and version control workflows

Preferred Qualifications
- Experience deploying models to AWS (SageMaker, S3, EC2)
- Exposure to distributed training or large-scale pipelines

Benefits
- Competitive salary
- Remote-friendly (hybrid schedule)
- Annual learning stipend
